meaning: n.[植] 山梗莱属的植物
examples: North american wild lobelia having small blue flowers and inflated capsules formerly used as an antispasmodic.
North American wild lobelia having small blue flowers and inflated capsules formerly used as an antispasmodic.
The leaves of a giant lobelia plant, photographed on Mount Kilimanjaros Shira Plateau in Tanzania, spiral around the center. Photograph by George F. Mobley.
